snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Chambdi Baba Bhagaye Bhoot | RajKummar Rao | Janhvi Kapoor | Varun Sharma | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Lo bhai aa gaya humara ek aur bollywood collab after ages
Roohi is releasing on 11th March
ONLY AND ONLY IN CINEMAS
JAANA AUR ZAROOR DEKHNA
Bhai maza aa gaya ye waale video mein kyunki apne iss video mein hai Rajkummar bhaiya, Varun bhai aur Janhvi Kapoor
Toh hum log jab goa mein apni mara rahe the tab apne @JioStudios  aur @Maddock Films  waalo ne apne ko bola ki bhai ek acha saa video bana na hai roohi ke star cast ke saath, waise toh bollywood collabs karna kaafi kamm kar diye hai (time nai re abhi ACV team ke paas, kaun mumbai jaye Ulhasnagar se😂😂) lekin ye waali star cast mein apne Raj bhai hai, jo actor ke roop mein kuch zyada hi ache insaan hai❤️ aur Varun Sharma ke saath toh apna pehle rishta tha
Toh hum mana nai kar paye
Plus Janhvi pe apun ko crush tha 😂😂
Upar se film ke producer Dinesh Vijan bhi kaafi respectful aur pyaare the, toh jab bhi bollywood se ache humble log milte (jo rare hota hai😂😂) humara dil kehta ki inke saath toh kaam karna hi chahiye
Islie bas humne kuch darawani movies dekhi apne bhootiyapa ko badaya aur ye script likhi jo hai chambdi baba ka part 2
Ye waala video end tak zaroor dekhna kyunki isme bahut masti hai aur kaafi zyada improvisation hai (all thanks to legend RAJKUMMAR RAO)
Production :
@Jashan Sirwani  , @Tanish Sirwani  , @Ritesh Sadhwani  toh hamesha hi hote hai
Is baar @Rohit Sadhwani  aur Grishim bhi chale kyunki bollywood ka collab tha, waise harami ke bache 2 din call nai uthate 
Main ek whatsapp kiya ki Rajkummar Rao se milne jaa rahe
Ghar ke neeche pahuch gaye saale
Iski script maine aur @Jashan Sirwani  ne saath mein likhi hai kyunki @Kunal Chhabhria  mc ko Ambernath se Ulhasnagar aane mein bhi bahut time lagta hai
Traffic ne dhanda kharab kar diya hai
Shoot humara Cinderella @Siddharth Kedare aur @Kunal Chhabhria ne kiya kyunki camera inke paas girvi rehta hai... bhadepe chalate hai aur kamate hai, mujhse paise nahi lete hai iss liye inko jhelna padta hai.
Baaki humara super super thanks to
Jio Studios jinhone hume phone karke ijjat di😂
Maddock films jinhone saamne se humari ijjat cheeni nahi😂
Rajkummar Rao jinse bahut saari cheeze seekhni ko mili, jaise ki jitna zyada talented banda utna kam ghamand🔥
Varun Sharma jinki comic timing aur expression meri acting distract kar rahi thi
Aur Janhvi Kapoor jinki maine raj bhai aur Varun bhai ne bahuuut taang kheechi 😂😂
All in all maza aa gaya please ye movie cinemas ke jaake zaroor dekhna
ROOHI IS RELEASING ON 11TH MARCH❤️

#Roohi #11thMarch #AshishChanchlani #RajKummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #MaddockFilms #JioStudios

snippet.title: क्या Jetha का Plan होगा कामयाब? - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep 3118-9thMarch, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3118: Will Jetha's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Episode 3119: Jetha Barks Like A Dog
---------------------------------------------------------
With Bhogilal and Champaklal getting the land deal sorted out in the drawing-room, the Gokuldham members are growing restless waiting in the kitchen and the bedroom. In the ensuing chaos, there's a loud noise from the bedroom. Champaklal says that he has kept a dog locked up in the bedroom. Hearing this, Jethalal is forced to bark like a dog so as to avoid any suspicions from Bhogilal. Watch the full episode now.

snippet.title: Feel the Power -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'Feel the Power', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Watch and listen to this energetic and unforgettable track composed by Thaman S that'll make you 'Feel The Power.'

Putting up a pompous show led by Puneeth Rajkumar, Jaani Master's style will keep you hooked to the screen. With a perky musical score, Feel The Power shall mark a new era.  
Shashank Sheshagiri's voice, Santhosh Ananddram's lyrics will leave you with a fantastic experience.

snippet.title: Bholenath Ki Shadi (Official Video) Hansraj Raghuwanshi || Shivratri Special 2021 | Jamie |RaviRaj||
snippet.description:
Bholenath Ki Shadi (Official Video) Hansraj Raghuwanshi || Maha Shivratri Special 2021 || Jamie || Ravi Raj ||
हंसराज रघुवंशी ने अपने नए अंदाज में आप सबको भोलेनाथ की शादी में आने के लिए आमंत्रित किया | आप सबको इसका Teaser बहुत पसंद आया |हंसराज रघुवंशी ने भोले के प्यार में भक्ति भाव में मस्त डांस किया |  

आप सबको महाशिवरात्रि 2021 की बहुत बहुत बधाई हो | 

Produced By Bholenath ji
Song : Bholenath Ki Shadi 

Singer :   Hansraj Raghuwanshi

On this episode of RELEASED, ROSÉ tests how well her friends know her, what artists are on her playlist, and performs solos with various instruments. RELEASED, every Thursday only on YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

es-419.description:
Mira el nuevo video musical de ROSÉ de "On the Ground" https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
En este episodio de RELEASED, ROSÉ pone a prueba cuán bien la conocen sus amigos, cuáles artistas están en su lista de reproducción y realiza solos con varios instrumentos. RELEASED, cada jueves solo en YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ja.title: ROSÉ ロゼ “On The Ground” | まもなく「RELEASED」で初公開
ja.description:
ROSÉの新曲“On The Ground”のミュージックビデオをチェック！https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
今週の「RELEASED」ではROSÉが登場し、友人がどれだけ自分を理解しているかテストをしたり、彼女のプレイリストの中身や様々な楽器を使ったソロ演奏などを披露します。「RELEASED」は毎週木曜日、YouTubeで独占配信。#RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

th.title: ROSÉ “On The Ground” | นับถอยหลังสู่การเปิดตัวทาง RELEASED (เต็มตอน)
th.description:
รับชมมิวสิกวิดีโอเพลง “On The Ground” เพลงใหม่ของ ROSÉ ตอนนี้ https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
ในรายการ RELEASED ตอนนี้ ROSÉ ทดสอบว่าเพื่อนๆ รู้จักเธอดีแค่ไหน ศิลปินคนไหนที่เธอชอบฟัง และการแสดงเดี่ยวกับเครื่องดนตรีหลากหลาย รับชม RELEASED ทุกวันพฤหัสบดี เฉพาะทาง YouTube #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

en.title: ROSÉ “On The Ground” | Countdown to Premiere on RELEASED (Full Episode)
en.description:
Watch ROSÉ’s new music video for “On The Ground” now.  https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
On this episode of RELEASED, ROSÉ tests how well her friends know her, what artists are on her playlist, and performs solos with various instruments. RELEASED, every Thursday only on YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

vi.title: ROSÉ “On The Ground” | Đếm ngược tới khi Lên sóng trên RELEASED (Trọn tập)
vi.description:
Xem video âm nhạc mới của ROSÉ "On The Ground" ngay https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
Trong tập này của RELEASED, hãy cùng ROSÉ xem thử bạn bè cô ấy hiểu cô ấy tới đâu, những nghệ sĩ nào có mặt trong danh sách phát của cô ấy, và xem cô ấy biểu diễn độc tấu nhiều nhạc cụ. RELEASED, thứ Năm hàng tuần, chỉ có trên YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ #OnTheGround

pt-BR.title: ROSÉ “On The Ground” | Contagem Regressiva para a Estreia no RELEASED (Episódio Completo)
pt-BR.description:
Assista ao novo clipe da ROSÉ, “On The Ground”, agora https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
Neste episódio de RELEASED, ROSÉ testa o quanto seus amigos a conhecem, revela quais artistas estão em sua playlist e toca solos com vários instrumentos. RELEASED, toda quinta, só no YouTube. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

ko.title: ROSÉ의 “On The Ground” | RELEASED 첫 공개 카운트다운 (전체 에피소드)
ko.description:
ROSÉ의 새로운 뮤직비디오 "On The Ground"를 지금 시청하세요 https://youtu.be/CKZvWhCqx1s
이번 RELEASED 에피소드에서는 ROSÉ가 친구들이 ROSÉ를 얼마나 잘 아는지, 플레이리스트에 어떤 아티스트가 있는지를 테스트하고 다양한 악기로 솔로 공연을 합니다. 매주 목요일 오직 YouTube에서 RELEASED를 만나보세요. #RELEASEDonYT #ROSÉ  #OnTheGround

id.title: ROSÉ "On The Ground" | Hitung Mundur Premier di RELEASED (Episode Lengkap)

snippet.title: Above All (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021 | Punjabi Songs
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents New Punjabi Song of 2021 Above All By Jassa Dhillon Ft Gur Sidhu.

Listen to Above All on all audio streaming platforms: https://jassadhillon.bfan.link/above-all.yde

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1nVZq7TGWWHfmKGeo535zJ

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/above-all-single/1555513749

Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/song/above-all/bl_A10320WT038216940Z

JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/above-all/DezXJDIRVyY_

Gaana: https://gaana.com/album/above-all-punjabi-1

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/album/above-all/62904995/

YT Music: https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_nN4BQHMgqU02zuv_n3JZ_rOojJ1WwGLrg

Amazon: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08XJKMTW6?ref=dm_sh_F1WtlG6YkVIE1EQE2ufA24A2A


Track Credits:
Title: Above All
Singer: Jassa Dhillon Ft Gur Sidhu
Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: J Statik
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Ishika & Manisha
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions
Edit  : GS Bhari 
Colour Grading : Prashant B Dhotre
Vfx by - Amit P Sharma
Special Thanks - Big Media & YGD Media
Producer - Nav Sandhu
Label : Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri
Media Promotions: Cross Media

Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta​

Lyrics:

Kon kahinda jatt maade aa hunde,
Vair paye maade bass jatta de,
Chande aa gandase rahinde,
Bulliya te haase rahinde,
Gaira vich khof rahinda,
Khade velly paase rahinde , 
utre dunaali vicho chopra te charde,

Arde ni gabbru ta jahra vicho vadd de,
Yaar te pyaar piche moohre hoke lad de,
Harde na yaar sohniye raule mukde na hunde kade vatta de,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de,


Ucchiya udaariya ,niviya farrariya,
Dass keda sher jithe mallan naio mariya,
24x 7 lohr aa ni vakhri g tohr aa,
Ni nave terе shehar ch puraanya te jor aa,
Bharde na takk balliyе vajj de aa fair jado patta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de


Gur Sidhu Music
Tattiya taseera ne , piche piche heera ne,
Sadde utte hath kude pakkya fakeera de,
Pale aa tufana vich , jamme aa mayan vich,
Tikkhe nale tez kude jive shamsheera ne,
Banya vajood sada todya ni jana,
Haqqa piche lade jatt modya ni,
Vakap ne saare keda janda ni dhillon nu,
Gutt kabbi khana toh marodya ni jana ,
pahila jede saan vajde , 
picho chalde bhaar kahinde latta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa ,
hunde vair paaye maade bass jatta de,


Dass keda aa vangarda , hune jatt thalda,
Mosam de saab naa ldaayi munda bhalda,
Mare na zameer kyoki ziddi jatt jyonde ne,
Ginti ch nio heere gaddara ch aunde ne,
Mode arrbi bandook awe teda takk na,
Kammm hustle aundi jithe aunda lakh na,
Jado jado jatt jud Saab lagde ne bottla de datta de , 
kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

en-US.description:

Lyrics:

Kon kahinda jatt maade aa hunde,
Vair paye maade bass jatta de,
Chande aa gandase rahinde,
Bulliya te haase rahinde,
Gaira vich khof rahinda,
Khade velly paase rahinde , 
utre dunaali vicho chopra te charde,

Arde ni gabbru ta jahra vicho vadd de,
Yaar te pyaar piche moohre hoke lad de,
Harde na yaar sohniye raule mukde na hunde kade vatta de,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de,


Ucchiya udaariya ,niviya farrariya,
Dass keda sher jithe mallan naio mariya,
24x 7 lohr aa ni vakhri g tohr aa,
Ni nave terе shehar ch puraanya te jor aa,
Bharde na takk balliyе vajj de aa fair jado patta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paye maade bass jatta de


Gur Sidhu Music
Tattiya taseera ne , piche piche heera ne,
Sadde utte hath kude pakkya fakeera de,
Pale aa tufana vich , jamme aa mayan vich,
Tikkhe nale tez kude jive shamsheera ne,
Banya vajood sada todya ni jana,
Haqqa piche lade jatt modya ni,
Vakap ne saare keda janda ni dhillon nu,
Gutt kabbi khana toh marodya ni jana ,
pahila jede saan vajde , 
picho chalde bhaar kahinde latta te,
Kon kahinda jatt maade aa ,
hunde vair paaye maade bass jatta de,


Dass keda aa vangarda , hune jatt thalda,
Mosam de saab naa ldaayi munda bhalda,
Mare na zameer kyoki ziddi jatt jyonde ne,
Ginti ch nio heere gaddara ch aunde ne,
Mode arrbi bandook awe teda takk na,
Kammm hustle aundi jithe aunda lakh na,
Jado jado jatt jud Saab lagde ne bottla de datta de , 
kon kahinda jatt maade aa , 
hunde vair paaye maade bs jatta de.

snippet.title: Swantham Sujatha - Ep 81 | 10 March 2021 | Surya TV | Malayalam Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the latest Episode of the New Malayalam Serial #SwanthamSujatha that airs on Surya TV.
 
Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021
   
#SwanthamSujatha #SuryaTV #MalayalamSerial

Swantham Sujatha revolves around Sujatha, a happy home maker, who loves her family and cherishes her life. But her life turns into a roller coaster ride, when she finds her true calling as an RJ after being home bound for years. Follow Sujatha’s story of self awakening , even as she deals with life’s challenges and finds a way around them.

snippet.title: Exams Ka Pressure ft. MyMissAnand | #PPC2021 #ExamsWarriors | ShrutiArjunAnand
snippet.description:
Samay ki Sui Exam Par Atak Gayi Par Dariye Mat Exams Toh Aate Jaate Rehte Hain Lekin Hausla Kum Nahi Hona Chahiye.Ek Naya Video Layi Hoon Aapke Mood ko Happy Aur Cheerful Karne k Liye. And Don’t Forget to Like Share & Subscribe as Much as You Can. Best Of Luck For Your EXAMS !!

Leave your Stress and Nervousness Behind and Get Ready to Set those Butterflies in your Stomach Free! On Popular Demand, This Time, The Prime Minister’s Massively Popular Interaction will not only have Students but also Parents and Teachers.It is always a joy to watch Hon'ble PM Shri @narendramodi interact with students in the Pariksha Pe Charcha. Let us all join the Festivities of
Exams and help our young Friends defeat Exam Stress. Participate in #PPC2021 and stand chance to interact with hon'ble Prime Minister.

Participation Link : https://innovateindia.mygov.in/ppc-2021/
#ExamWarriors #PPC2021

snippet.description:
Ajay Hooda New Song, White Hill Dhaakad presents New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 "Tu Gori Mai Kala" by Arvind Jangid. Starring Ajay Hooda, Rashalika Sabharwal. Lyrics by Ajay Hooda. Music by Arvind Jangid. Video by Deepesh Goyal. Produced By Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu. In this song, the boy falls in love with a girl but he hesitates to express his feelings because they have nothing in common. Subscribe to our channel to listen to New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021.

snippet.title: महाशिवरात्रि की रात ये गलती न करें | Don't Do This Mistake | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
इस महाशिवरात्रि पर सद्गुरु 10 लाख से ज़्यादा रुद्राक्ष प्राण-प्रतिष्ठित करेंगे। यह रुद्राक्ष और दूसरी सामग्रियां सभी साधकों को फ्री भेंट की जाएंगी, जिससे उन्हें साधना में मदद मिलेगी। रुद्राक्ष प्राप्त करने के लिए इस लिंक पर जाकर रजिस्टर करें : https://isha.co/Rudraksh-Hin

snippet.title: CID MOOSA | PRAGATHI
snippet.description:
'CID MOOSA' An evergreen comical box office hit in Malayalam film industry. The whole plot took us for a roller coaster of fun and laughter. Cinemas were filled with roaring laughs watching the Hollywood flicks of super characters , funky cars and wits of MOOSA . The surprising musical arrangements of the film have amused all of us and are still in our playlist . Here PRAGATHI comes up with a reprise of the epic song KAADIRANGI . Go watch ,enjoy and repeat 🔁 

Pragathi

KS Harisankar ( Vocals)
Precious Peter (Keys)
Abin Sagar (Guitars)
Abhijith Sudhi (Bass)
Abishek Amanath (Drums)

Original Song Credits

Lyrics - Gireesh Puthancheri
Music - Vidyasagar
Singer- V Devanand, Prathap, Timmi & Tippu
Movie - CID Moosa

Recorded & Mixed By Sai Prakash @My Studio, Kochi
Mastered By Balu Thankachan @20db Sound Studios, Chennai

Produced By BOLDOVA PRODUCTIONS

Director Of Photography - Naveen Chempodi

Screenplay - KS Harisankar

Editor- Renjit Varma

D.I -  Arjun Menon

Art Director - Jayan Crayon

Stills- Nirmal Gylson

Project Manager- Ghadha Sidharthan

Associate Cinematographer- Amritha Padmakumar

Sync Sound - Shibin 

Styled by Sooraj SK

Posters Designed by Kenophob


Special Thanks

Nadirsha
Faiz Siddik
MR Rajakrishnan

Renoy stephen  
Vicky

snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhagwaan-bhogilal-ka-bhala-kare-1000110839?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3120: Bagha Flopped Jetha's Plan
---------------------------------------------------------
Bagha comes into Gokuldham society and sees Bhogilal's car. He thinks that Bhogilal has come to return Jethalal's 50 Lakh rupees. Bhogilal was about to close the land deal when Bagha entered the room. Bhogilal immediately recognized him. Taarak tries to handle the situation but Bhogilal comes to know about Jethalal's Plan. Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Rae tanae dhokhe aali foonk tae bujayi baati rae
baat kari ghani tanae taati taati rae
maada tame dekh kae nae kalaa chhod diya
reha koni yaar ka aaj koye sathi rae
rae kuchh reha bhi ni baaki ghani khelgi chalaaki
ib kis nae bta de badnaam kah du mae

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae tanae dhokhe aala teer sidha maarya chhati main
rae nash nash main terae dhokha bharya
jhoothi saachi baat manae maani saari saachi rae
tere chakkar main aake manae kaand tha karya
teri baat saari jaali teri baat thi rae jaali
kisne bta de tera naam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae maade aala krishan bhukha pyar ka tha
bas dhokha bharya teri neet main
tanae pyar aali baaji khwli dhokae tai
usne samajh baithi jeet rae
anil agarwal kare pyar aaj bhi
rae roj tere naam ka ek jaam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

#afterpregnancycarevlog

In this video we are showing my wife vasu and her child care after pregnancy , we use kerala traditional Prasava Raksha Chikithsa is one of kandamkulath's special treatment programme ensuring postnatal care for the mother and child. Soothika ensures the health of mother and child after delivery. The this is formulated in a special way which ensures the revitalization of energy and prevention from future health complications for both mother and child and the common health problems which may arise after delivery

snippet.title: BTS | Meet The First-Time GRAMMY Nominees
snippet.description:
In the latest episode of GRAMMY.com's annual Meet The First-Time GRAMMY Nominee series, global pop superstars BTS share their excitement and "overflowing gratitude" for their fans for their Best Pop Duo/Group Performance nomination at the 2021 GRAMMY Awards show.

Tune into the 63rd GRAMMY Awards Sunday, March 14, on CBS to find out who will win.

https://www.grammy.com/grammys/news/bts-interview-2021-grammys-meet-the-first-time-grammy-nominee

About the Recording Academy / GRAMMYs: 
Recording Academy is the world's leading society of musical professionals, and is dedicated to celebrating, honoring, and sustaining music's past, present and future. 

Connect with the Recording Academy / GRAMMYs: 
WEBSITE: http://www.grammy.com
FACEBOOK: http://grm.my/2gcTcMk

snippet.title: Tv Ads Vs Reality | Guddu Bhaiya
snippet.description:
Connect with me on my Instagram !

https://www.instagram.com/dilsepaneer​​​

Hello Guys !

I am here again with a new video which is " Advertisement vs Reality " !
In this video, I showed how Indian TV Ads exaggerate itself, but in reality they look totally opposite.

This video is just for the entertainment purpose only.
I hope you enjoy !

Cast - 
Vibhu Varshney
Yash Srivastava
Anubhav Golia

Edit by Vibhu Varshney

Managed by Pankaj Sharma

Thank you for watching !

#AdsVsReality #TVAdsVsReality #AdvertisementVsReality
tags: Food in TV ads vs reality

snippet.description:

The lyrics of the song are penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya; music by Tanishk Bagchi. 
The movie is written and directed by Amin Hajee; produced by T-Series Films & Amin Hajee Film Company. 
Movie Releasing on 2 April 2021

snippet.title: சிவராத்திரி 4 கால பூஜைகள் & விரத முறைகள்| Sivarathiri | Maha Shivratri 2021 | Shivaratri vratham
snippet.description:
சிவபுராணம் தினமும் கேட்பதற்காக தமிழ் & ஆங்கில வரிகளுடன் | Sivapuranam in my voice with lyrics
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MiRay98qWCY

சிவராத்திரி விரதம் இருக்கும் முறை, செய்ய வேண்டிய 4 கால பூஜைகள், அபிஷேகங்கள், அர்ச்சனைகள், நெய்வேத்தியம், படிக்க வேண்டிய பதிகங்கள், பூஜை செய்ய வேண்டிய நேரம் என அனைத்து தகவல்களையும் திருமதி. தேச மங்கையர்க்கரசி அம்மா அவர்கள் இந்த வீடியோவில் விளக்கமாக பதிவிட்டுள்ளார். 

சிவராத்திரி விரதம் மேற்கொள்ளும் உங்கள் நண்பர்கள் மற்றும் உறவினர்களுக்கு இந்த வீடியோவை ஷேர் செய்து அவர்களும் அறியும்படி செய்யுங்கள்.  

- ஆத்ம ஞான மையம்

snippet.title: How to Celebrate MahaShivRatri at Home
snippet.description:
Mahashivratri will be celebrated on March 11. In this video, find out how you can make yourself receptive to the spiritual possibilities of this phenomenal night.

Don't miss the celebrations at Isha Yoga Center, which will feature Midnight Mediation & Satsang with Sadhguru, and cultural performances by renowned artists. Watch it live from home, online or on TV. 
Isha.sadhguru.org/MSR
#Sadhguru #Mahashivratri2021
Yogi, mystic and visionary, Sadhguru is a spiritual master with a difference. An arresting blend of profundity and pragmatism, his life and work serves as a reminder that yoga is a contemporary science, vitally relevant to our times. 

----------------------------------------
'Karma: A Yogi's Guide to Crafting Destiny.' - A book by Sadhguru

Pre-order Now: https://sadhguru.org/karma

Available everywhere: April 27, 2021
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
In the Grace of Yoga” with Sadhguru is a unique Yoga program that offers an in-depth exploration of the five elements (earth, water, air, fire, and space), their significance, their manifestation within us and an opportunity to learn powerful tools for their purification. By purifying and mastering the five elements, or pancha bhutas, you can bring your body and mind to a vibrant state of health and rejuvenation.  

The program is available in two formats. ( Register now ) 
  3-day online program: March 9-11, 2021
  1-day online program: March 11, 2021  
⚡ https://isha.co/GOY-YT⚡
------------------------------------------------------------
For the very first time this Mahashivratri, Sadhguru has opened up the possibility of receiving Rudraksha Diksha. Receive a Rudraksha powerfully energized by Sadhguru and other materials which would support the seeker in sadhana. Register today!

snippet.title: Family Trips & Seeti Baaz Audience | Crowd Work + Assorted Jokes | Standup Comedy by Gaurav Gupta.
snippet.description:
Hi Guys please share if you liked the video and do subscribe the channel.
I will be doing my standup special "MARKET DOWN HAI" Live Show in various cities and taking this special Internationally in DUBAI. Please find dates and ticket link below.

Lucknow - 12th Mar
Kanpur - 13th Mar
Varanasi - 14th Mar
Jaipur - 19th Mar
Bangalore - 20th Mar
Hyderabad - 21st Mar
Ticket Link: 
https://in.bookmyshow.com/events/market-down-hai-stand-up-comedy-by-gaurav-gupta/ET00145786

Delhi 15th March & Gurgaon 24th March
Ticket Link: 
https://linktr.ee/gauravcomic

DUBAI - 26 & 27th Mar
Ticket Link: 
https://ae.bookmyshow.com/events/market-down-hai/ET00007289

Follow:- 
Insta:- https://www.instagram.com/gaurav_comic/​
FB page:- https://www.facebook.com/standupcomic​...
Twitter:- https://twitter.com/GauravGcomic​

Credits:-
Venue: The Laugh Club, Chandigarh
Video Editing:  Aseem Mathur (Neona Films)
Sound Mixing: Sreejith Menon
Written and Performed by: Gaurav Gupta

USTRAA Ayurvedic Hair Oil
Ustraa Website - http://bit.ly/2Pbzl6H | Use Code AASHQEEN10 for extra 10% Discount 
Amazon - http://amzn.to/2ZLCzjt
Flipkart - http://bit.ly/3svryiB

Subscribe to Gaurav Arora : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiwLz8jafDS-lsLDreKJD0w

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1192 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
On the day of Heer's gender change operation, Virat takes her on a romantic date. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode as Angel squash to ruin Heer's dreams.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 13 Teaser - 11th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Chanda Jhaanke - Official Video | Hansraj Raghuwanshi | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
'Chanda Jhaanke' is a devotional track but with a new-age sound crafted by Salim Sulaiman and has an infectious World music rhythm. 

The powerful vocals of Hansraj Raghuwanshi & Salim Merchant add a rich tint of folk with multiple Indian instruments enhancing the folk vibe of the song! Shradha Pandit has written the song in a poetic way that makes it more relatable to non-religious listeners as well. The ending of the song talks about different names for Lord Shiva.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Chanda Jhaanke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5X3oePi6rfWKfwwcAbjXQL?si=U3Weemg-Q_WckZkDjcsVag

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/chanda-jhaanke-single/1555674482

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/chanda-jhaanke

JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/hindi/Chanda-Jhaanke/Chanda-Jhaanke/BAASQAIHZ18

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJLb39eh/

Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08XLXK8MR?marketplaceId=A3K6Y4MI8GDYMT&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08XLWBQH2

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/song/chanda-jhaanke/63302657/

Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/OJxAXMZYm

Subscribe our channel for more music every week! ✨

Lyrics
Teri meri majbooriyan da naa hai dooriyan 

Das main ki karan
Milan ya rehan Dan 
Aawan kiwe tere kol mahia 

Gal naal la lawan 
Udd k aa jawan
Dass mainu kra ki m mahiya

Tu hi meri sarriyan khwahishan nu 
Karda reha Puriyan 

Teri meri ......
Har ek Lamha ye bin tere tanha hai 
Tu kaise rehti bta

Maine kha na jo , tune suna hai wo
Kehna hai  ab tujhko kya , 

Raaton ko jagu Main , taaron se hi ab main 
Gallan kara teriyan meriyan , 

Teri meri........ 

Krde hawaan naaal gallan sohneya
Kaash Tu mere samne aajaavein
Mere kol baike kuj gallan ve krein
Fir mainyu gale naal la laawae

Badi mushkil naal langdiaa ne
Raas tere bin raatan  meriyaan

Teri meri mazbooriyan da na hai dooriyan....


#Dooriyan #latestpunjabisongs2021 #ritsbadiani #surya #kartikdev #gauravdev #rishikakapoor

snippet.title: Hotstar Specials OK Computer | Trailer I Vijay Varma, Radhika Apte, Jackie Shroff, Anand Gandhi
snippet.description:
We have stone age emotions, industrial age institutions and space age technology - how are we going to reconcile our intentions with a future that arrives faster than we can imagine it? In the absence of legal or moral precedents for crimes committed by Artificial Intelligence, who does the justice system frame charges against? Errant technology or its human inventors?

 Hotstar Specials presents Ok Computer, all episodes streaming from Mar 26 

Created and Directed by: Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar
Produced by: Anand Gandhi, Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: My first VLOG ENJOYED IN KASHMIR
snippet.description:
I had been longing to travel since a long time now, I recently had an opportunity to travel to one of the most beautiful places in our country for work, and I must say it was a wonderful experience, not just because of the place but also because of the people I had the chance to work with, souls as beautiful as the place.

Some of you had suggested me to make a vlog... so here’s a little something that I have complied from my last trip to Kashmir. 
Please have a look and let me know if you like it. Your feedback means a lot ♥️
